Source.Name: img2pdf
Source.Summary: Losslessly convert raster images to PDF
Source.Description: Python 3 library and command line utility img2pdf for losslessly converting a bunch of image files into a PDF file. That means that the images are either inserted into the PDF as-is or they are recompressed using lossless compression. Thus, img2pdf usually runs faster and may yield smaller PDF files than an ImageMagick convert command.

Package.Name: img2pdf
Package.Summary: Losslessly convert raster images to PDF
Package.Description: Python 3 library and command line utility img2pdf for losslessly converting a bunch of image files into a PDF file. That means that the images are either inserted into the PDF as-is or they are recompressed using lossless compression. Thus, img2pdf usually runs faster and may yield smaller PDF files than an ImageMagick convert command.
